mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS id, u.user_id AS username, u.user_name AS name, u.email, u.phone, u.department, COALESCE(cc.code_name, u.position_id) AS position, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = u.user_id AND ur.role_id IN ('ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN', 'ROLE_ADMIN') ) THEN 'ADMIN' ELSE 'USER' END AS role, u.created_date AS "createdAt" FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_common_code cc ON cc.code_id = u.position_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT login_ip AS "loginIp", login_success AS "loginSuccess", login_fail_reason AS "loginFailReason", login_date AS "loginDate" FROM tb_login_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY login_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
